subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest how the Dayspring of utterance hath been prevented from the wondrous praise of Thee by reason of that which the hands of the rebellious have wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری مطلع البیان منع عن بدایع ذکرک بما اکتسبت ایدی اهل الطغیان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @petitions to authorities, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for protection, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause
